column2: Pivot tables may include fields that are hidden. To display any hidden fields, please follow the instructions below.
Click a cell in the Pivot Table within the Values component of the pivot table.
In the Menu Ribbon, click on "Analyze" and then click on "Field List".
A complete list of fields will be presented on the right hand of the screen. Drag and drop any unchecked fields in the pivot Filters, Columns, Rows or Values.
